title: MQTT autostart uses Mosquitto and broker.json
description:
## Intent
As a developer, I want MQTT to autostart Mosquitto locally when broker auto is enabled so I do not manage a broker manually.

## Gherkin
Feature: MQTT autostart
  Scenario: Autostart mosquitto when broker auto
    Given realtime transport is "mqtt" and broker is "auto"
    And mosquitto is installed
    When the gossip client starts
    Then it launches mosquitto bound to 127.0.0.1
    And it writes broker.json with endpoint and pid

## Definition of Done
- MQTT client can autostart Mosquitto and write broker.json metadata.
creator: ryan.porter
